message:
feat: Add .env file loading and fix Claude CLI WASM polyfills

## Changes

### .env File Support
- Implemented automatic .env file loading in edgebox runtime
- Loads before WASM execution to set API keys and config
- Supports $HOME expansion in values
- Optional - missing .env doesn't cause errors
- Debug output with EDGEBOX_DEBUG=1

### Polyfill Fixes
- Added addEventListener/removeEventListener to AbortSignal
- Fixed EventTarget availability in bundle scope
- Added early v9() global function for SDK compatibility
- Fixed HTTP fetch dispatch (8 args instead of 9)
- Added DOM-style event handling to AbortSignal

### Documentation
- Added .env usage guide to CLAUDE.md
- Documented test environment setup
- Added security notes about ~/.claude directory

### Security
- .env file properly gitignored
- No API keys in committed code
- Test settings isolated from user's ~/.claude

## Testing
- CLI now reaches action_after_plugins_init milestone
- All spawns, file I/O, and event loop working
- EventTarget and AbortSignal properly initialized
- Fetch calls being made (pending full API integration)

Co-authored-by: Claude <claude@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -58,4 +58,5 @@ vendor/wasmedge/build*/
 vendor/quickjs-ng/build*/
 
 # Test files should be in test/ directory
-/test_*.js
\ No newline at end of file
+/test_*.js.env
+.env
